action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

In addition to common actions, you can iscad, eriat, ovesis, mingne, setral and lepht.

Your goal for this game is: Make the strood aphistic, the aciong dolam and the swaiced ailly.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a encal now. There are a oming, a inchan, a perent, a strood, a aciong and a eucty. There is a passage to a stful here.
action.label: context

action.content: I don't know how to interpret this 'aphistic' action.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't see a swaiced here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a stful now. There are a ostion and a oroust. There are passages to a encal and a emoust here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a emoust now. There is a pyelly. There are passages to a stful and a etiont here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a etiont now. There is a swaiced. There is a passage to a emoust here.
action.label: context

action.content: Model produced DONE action at turn 16, end episode.
